revision.comment: Amakuru moved page [[Template:Start-date]] to [[Template:Start date text]]: [[Special:Permalink/1176713239|Requested]] by MaterialWorks at [[WP:RM/TR]]: See above.
Text replacement - "[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects D]]" to ""
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23606305292|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24296132115|time triggered pipeline]]
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24975162458|time triggered pipeline]]
